svg.title: UPS PensionsGo Comprehensive System Architecture
svg.desc: Comprehensive architecture diagram for UPS PensionsGo showing actors, frontend pages and PWA shell, PHP API layer, shared runtime services, domain services, database stores, filesystem storage, background workers, documentation outputs, and future integration points.
svg.text: Current repository architecture: 41 HTML pages, 50 JavaScript files, 264 PHP API endpoints, 83 database tables, PWA shell, background workers, uploads, exports, backups, and governance tooling
Payroll, suspensions, HR, ID, payment, SMS/email
footer, UI feedback, live chat, selectors
Frontend communicates with backend/api/*.php using Fetch/AJAX JSON and FormData over same-origin HTTP/HTTPS, PHP session cookies, CSRF tokens, and device headers.
3. Server Bootstrap, Security Boundary, and Shared Runtime
file rules, scan logs, attachment limits
4. PHP API Surface by Business Domain
delete requests, recycle bin, box allocation
queue, digests, sound library, clear queue
claims, dashboards, lifecycle, alerts, user logs
Each endpoint enters through shared bootstrap services, checks authorization, reads/writes domain stores, and returns JSON or file responses.
5. Persistence, Filesystem Storage, and Background Execution
Data anchors: userId, regNo, fileNo, registry id, task id, payroll cycle id, arrears ledger/payment ids, message id, and audit/session/log ids.
6. Documentation, Governance Outputs, and Extension Points
system docs, technical docs, user/admin manual, role manuals
ERDs, domain ERDs, DFDs, architecture diagrams, handouts
DOCX, PDF, PPTX, reports, exports, templates, backups
National ID, HR systems, government payment platforms, SMS/email gateways, document repositories, GovHub/API exchange
Source basis: repository structure and documentation snapshot on 2026-05-28
